sentence: El llobu baxa del monte al valle.
ipa: ˈel ˈʎoβu ˈbaʃa ˈdel ˈmonte ˈal ˈbaʎe
gloss_en: The wolf comes down from the hill to the valley.
notes: This code inherits the ast-x-leon grapheme->phoneme table verbatim; it differs only in scope (modern León/Zamora/Salamanca, Spain). Word-initial L->[ʎ] 'llobu', -LL->[ʎ] 'valle' and final -u per morala_egido2009; betacism 'llobu' [b] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: La xente fala llionés na fiesta.
ipa: ˈla ˈʃente ˈfala ʎjoˈnɛs̺ ˈna ˈfjes̺ta
gloss_en: The people speak Leonese at the fair.
notes: ⟨x⟩ [ʃ] 'xente' and word-initial L->[ʎ] 'llionés' per morala_egido2009; F- retention 'fala' and diphthong 'fiesta','llionés' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Coyimos ñisos y ñueces nel sardón.
ipa: koˈʝimos̺ ˈɲiz̺os̺ ˈʝ ˈɲwet͡ses̺ ˈnel s̺aˈɾdɔn
gloss_en: We picked plums and walnuts in the oak grove.
notes: Word-initial N->[ɲ] 'ñisos','ñueces' and tonic Ŏ>/ue/ 'ñueces' per morala_egido2009; the Leonese sibilant system voices intervocalic ⟨s⟩ [z̺] and affricates ⟨c⟩ [t͡s] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: El rapaz cueye la fueya seca.
ipa: ˈel raˈpaz̻ kweˈʝe ˈla fweˈʝa ˈs̺eka
gloss_en: The boy picks the dry leaf.
notes: Tonic Ŏ>/ue/ 'cueye','fueya' and -LJ->[ʝ] per morala_egido2009; coda ⟨z⟩ apico [z̻] 'rapaz' and voiced ⟨s⟩ [z̺] 'seca' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: ¿Cuántos guaḥes hai na escuela?
ipa: ˈkuantos̺ ˈɡahes̺ ˈaj ˈna eˈs̺kwela
gloss_en: How many boys are there in the school?
notes: Leonese 'guaḥe' (boy), ⟨ḥ⟩ [h] per morala_egido2009; diphthong 'Cuántos','escuela' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: La muyer amasa'l pan de centenu.
ipa: ˈla muˈʝeɾ aˈmaz̺a ˈl ˈpan ˈde t͡seˈntenu
gloss_en: The woman kneads the rye bread.
notes: -LJ->[ʝ] 'muyer' and final -u 'centenu' per morala_egido2009; intervocalic ⟨s⟩ voiced [z̺] 'amasa' and ⟨c⟩ affricate [t͡s] 'centenu' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: ¡Pieslla la puerta, que fai fríu!
ipa: ˈpjes̺ʎa ˈla ˈpweɾta ˈke ˈfaj ˈfɾiu
gloss_en: Shut the door, it's cold!
notes: -LL->[ʎ] 'Pieslla' and tonic Ĕ>/ie/ 'Pieslla', Ŏ>/ue/ 'puerta' per morala_egido2009; 'fai' (< face) per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Tres cabras pacen na llomba.
ipa: ˈtɾes̺ ˈkabɾas̺ paˈt͡sen ˈna ˈʎomba
gloss_en: Three goats graze on the ridge.
notes: Word-initial L->[ʎ] 'llomba' per morala_egido2009; ⟨c⟩ before front vowel realised as Leonese affricate [t͡s] 'pacen' not [θ] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: El ferreiru fizo una cerradura.
ipa: ˈel feˈrejɾu ˈfid͡zo ˈuna t͡seraˈðuɾa
gloss_en: The blacksmith made a lock.
notes: Western ⟨ei⟩ 'ferreiru' and final -u per morala_egido2009; ⟨z⟩ voiced affricate [d͡z] 'fizo', ⟨c⟩ affricate [t͡s] 'cerradura' and trill [r] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Meyor nun dir agora a la villa.
ipa: meˈʝoɾ ˈnun ˈdiɾ aˈɣoɾa ˈa ˈla ˈbiʎa
gloss_en: Better not to go to town now.
notes: -LJ->[ʝ] 'Meyor', negator 'nun' and -LL->[ʎ] 'villa' per morala_egido2009; 'dir' (< to go) per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: La ñeve cuayó nel teyáu.
ipa: ˈla ˈɲebe kwaˈʝɔ ˈnel teˈʝau
gloss_en: The snow settled on the roof.
notes: Word-initial N->[ɲ] 'ñeve' and -LJ->[ʝ] 'cuayó','teyáu' per morala_egido2009; tonic Ŏ>/ua/ diphthong 'cuayó' and betacism 'ñeve' [b] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: El gatu ñeru duerme cabu'l llar.
ipa: ˈel ˈɡatu ˈɲeɾu ˈdweɾme ˈkaβu ˈl ˈʎaɾ
gloss_en: The cat sleeps by the hearth.
notes: Word-initial N->[ɲ] 'ñeru' and L->[ʎ] 'llar' per morala_egido2009; tonic Ŏ>/ue/ 'duerme' and final -u per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Llovía muitu cuando chegóu.
ipa: ʎoˈbia ˈmwitu ˈkwando tʃeˈɣɔu
gloss_en: It rained a lot when he arrived.
notes: Word-initial L->[ʎ] 'Llovía', -CT->/it/ 'muitu' and western ⟨ou⟩ 'chegóu' per morala_egido2009; ⟨ch⟩ [tʃ] 'chegóu' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: La fonte cuerre cerca la ilesia.
ipa: ˈla ˈfonte ˈkwere ˈt͡seɾka ˈla iˈlez̺ja
gloss_en: The spring runs near the church.
notes: Tonic Ŏ>/ue/ 'cuerre' per morala_egido2009; ⟨c⟩ affricate [t͡s] 'cerca', voiced ⟨s⟩ [z̺] 'ilesia' and trill [r] per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: El perru lladra na corrada.
ipa: ˈel ˈperu ˈʎadɾa ˈna koˈraða
gloss_en: The dog barks in the yard.
notes: Word-initial L->[ʎ] 'lladra' and final -u 'perru' per morala_egido2009; trill [r] 'perru','corrada' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: La lluz rellumbra sobre'l ríu.
ipa: ˈla ˈʎuz̻ reˈʎumbɾa ˈs̺obɾe ˈl ˈriu
gloss_en: The light shines over the river.
notes: Word-initial and -LL->[ʎ] 'lluz','rellumbra' per morala_egido2009; coda ⟨z⟩ apico [z̻] 'lluz' and trill [r] 'ríu' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: El rapaz ruempe la rama.
ipa: ˈel raˈpaz̻ ˈrwempe ˈla ˈrama
gloss_en: The boy breaks the branch.
notes: Tonic Ŏ>/ue/ 'ruempe' per morala_egido2009; coda ⟨z⟩ apico [z̻] 'rapaz' and trill [r] 'ruempe','rama' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Diez homes trabayan na mina.
ipa: ˈdjez̻ ˈomes̺ tɾaβaˈʝan ˈna ˈmina
gloss_en: Ten men work in the mine.
notes: -LJ->[ʝ] 'trabayan' and diphthong 'Diez' [dje-] per morala_egido2009; coda ⟨z⟩ apico [z̻] 'Diez' per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: La muyer coyó peras nel güertu.
ipa: ˈla muˈʝeɾ koˈʝɔ ˈpeɾas̺ ˈnel ˈɡweɾtu
gloss_en: The woman picked pears in the garden.
notes: -LJ->[ʝ] 'muyer','coyó' and final -u 'güertu' per morala_egido2009; voiced ⟨s⟩ [z̺]... betacism and 'güertu' (< huerto) per garcia_arias2003.

sentence: Nun queda pan nin queisu na cocina.
ipa: ˈnun ˈkeða ˈpan ˈnin ˈkejz̺u ˈna koˈt͡sina
gloss_en: There's no bread or cheese left in the kitchen.
notes: Negator 'nun'/'nin' and western ⟨ei⟩ 'queisu' per morala_egido2009; ⟨c⟩ affricate [t͡s] 'cocina' and final -u per garcia_arias2003.
